title: The Crimson Challenge
writer: Vingie E. Roe, Beulah Marie Dix
actors: Dorothy Dalton, Jack Mower, Frank Campeau
plot: In the cattle town of Lost Valley, Buck Courtrey, saloon owner and political boss, covets Tharon, daughter of Jim Last, a small rancher; and when rebuffed, he has Last killed. Tharon swears revenge with her father's own guns and o...
